entry.title: Re: Repeat value from previous cell when it is blank per...

entry.title: Re: Regarding Unable to Activate with error messages in 'Manage Contract' App
entry.content: forwarded to experts

entry.title: Re: How to re-forward transport requests from test to prod in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: I am afraid you used an incorrect tag for your question: Transports in S/4HANA Cloud are not performed using SAP Cloud Transport Management. Therefore experts following this tag (like me) will not be able to support. The error message seems to be quite application specific (not technical), so you might try a tag referring to the application in question.

entry.title: Re: Revenue Recognition - Cost-Based Percentage of Completion Methods with different WBS
entry.content: forwarded to experts

entry.title: NF-e Nota Técnica 2024.001 Versão 1.10: Atualizações recentes na Nota Fiscal Eletrônica (NF-e)
entry.content:
(English version here) 

Olá pessoal,

O time de SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, opção de emissão de fatura de entrada e de faturamento de saída para o Brasil entregou atualizações relacionadas à Nota Fiscal Eletrônica (NF-e). As atualizações estão conforme a Nota Técnica 2024.001 versão 1.10 de NF-e. A nova versão está prevista para entrar em produção em 2 de setembro de 2024, segundo a SEFAZ.

NF-e Nota Técnica 2024.001 Versão 1.10

As novas atualizações para notas fiscais eletrônicas (modelo 55) substituem o processo de denegação pelo processo de rejeição e adicionam a opção 4 (Simples Nacional - Microempreendedor Individual - MEI) no campo Código de Regime Tributário.

Você pode implementar essas alterações na opção de emissão de fatura de saída para o Brasil seguindo as instruções da SAP Note 3487670 e SAP Note 3488179.

Se você usa a opção de emissão de fatura de entrada para o Brasil, siga as instruções na SAP Note 3488179.

Você também pode implementar as SAP Notes acima na solução SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP NFE).

Blog posts relacionados:

  • Dashboard do Usage Analytics
  • Como navegar facilmente nas páginas do SAP Help Portal para Outbound Nota Fiscal
  • Como navegar facilmente nas páginas do SAP Help Portal para Inbound Nota Fiscal

Para obter um passo a passo sobre como usar o SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, opção de emissão de fatura de entrada e de faturamento de saída para o Brasil, consulte as seguintes páginas do portal SAP Help:

  • Opção de faturamento de saída para o Brasil
  • Opção de emissão de fatura de entrada para o Brasil

Você pode receber alerta por email quando novas SAP Notes forem lançadas ou atualizadas nos componentes listados abaixo; basta seguir as instruções do SAP Knowledge Base Article 2171560.

  • FI-LOC-NFE-BR-OUT
  • FI-LOC-NFE-BR-IN
  • CA-GTF-CSC-EDO-BR
  • LOD-LH-NFE

Acesse o gerenciador de modificações legais para ter uma noção do que está planejado para ser suportado. Consulte o SAP Knowledge Base Article 3421995 e a página Regulatory Change Manager para entender como usar esta ferramenta.

Gostou desse post? Dê um “like” (kudos) e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas. Sinta-se à vontade para deixar suas perguntas no SAP Community e ler posts semelhantes no blogging space do SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

Para acompanhar as últimas notícias da NF-e, siga a tag SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica) e a comunidade SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

Obrigado e até a próxima,
Thiago

Tags: brazil, brasil, einvoice, einvoicing, e-invoicing, electronic invoice, electronic invoicing, edocument, edoc, e-document, e-docs, e-doc, e-docs, drc, document compliance, nota fiscal eletrônica, electronic nota fiscal, outbound, nf-e, grc, technical note, 2024.001, crt, nt 2024.001, j_1bcrt, changes for individual microentrepreneur, documento fiscal eletronico, electronic fiscal document, simples nacional, microempreendedor individual, mei, micro empreendedor individual, código de regime tributário, crt, denial, rejection, status code, denied, denegação

entry.title: Re: Pick list date must be between order date and cancell...
entry.content: Hi, This SAP note is not helpful for me. It's relevant under the pick list number issue related.

entry.title: Cloud Identity services neo migration to cloud foundry
entry.content:
Hi All,


I have a general question. We have a CIS tenant in the NEO environment (Germany/Netherlands). According to SAP, for other services in the BTP environment, new services are not being offered in the NEO environment; they are only available in the multi-cloud Foundry environment (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud). For example, for CPI, SAP recommends customers to migrate from NEO CPI to the Cloud Foundry Integration Suite, the same applies to API management and mobile services.


Should we do the same for the CIS system as well? I have not found any blogs or documentation discussing the migration of CIS services running on the SAP NEO Data Center to the Cloud Foundry environment. If there is any information available, please share it, and what is the last supported date for the CIS system in NEO environment.

 

 

Thanks and Regards

Zameer Ahamad

entry.title: Re: How to trigger Build Process Automation (BPA) workflo...
entry.content: In the end you are just calling an API so you could do it from anywhere you can make HTTP calls (helps to use destinations but not required).

entry.title: Re: Fiori LP App LP Tile throws "Unable to set property '...
entry.content:
Thank you @junwu for reply, I am aware the system is rather outdated. However I should think it still must be possible to create and run apps on it. 

Some tweaks I made which helped:

1. in SAP BAS, the minimum SAPUI5 version was lowered to 1.71.57

2. In LPD_CUST, URL for the service was corrected, from /default_host/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/<z_my_service> to just /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/<z_my_service>

3. In LP Admin, in target configuration for my tile, the app type was changed from "SAPUI5 Fiori app" to "SAP Fiori App with LPD_CUST"

At the moment the app at least runs from the launchpad, albeit not looking as it did at minimum SAPUI5 1.121

entry.title: Re: SAPSetVariable Does Not Work

When I searched it on the internet, it actually seems very easy. But I can't figure out what's missing.

entry.title: Re: No processor in submitted documents on Verify General...
entry.content: Hi Henrike, thank you for your answer. This problem has been solved though, i forgot to add it here. There was a mistake in workflow configuration, once it's solved, the problem has gone. Thanks for the helpful sharing again!

entry.title: Re: BTP Integration Suite API Management and Stage Releva...
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

as far as I know, API Management content is also packaged as an MTA (like Cloud Integration content), so that speaking purely technical, MTA extensions should also work for API-M transport requests. 

However, I have no idea how an extension descriptor for API-M would look like and if it would be processed by API-M in a comparable way to Cloud Integration...

Kind regards
Harald

entry.title: Re: Outbound Service Consumption Model Error - Failed to change codepage (OData V4)
entry.content: forwarded to experts

entry.title: Re: BUPA_SEND vs DRFOUT - what is the difference and when to use which one?
entry.content:
Meanwhile there is sapnote#2679069 - MDG-DRF: DRFOUT does not use DRFF filters - which might explain the different behaviour  regarding DRFF filters

DRFOUT does not respect any DRFF filters by design once you specify a manual filter criteria in DRFOUT.
If you wish to replicate objects manually while also considering filters set in DRFF, this has to be done in the MDG UI using the "Replicate by <object> selection" functionality.

entry.title: Re: Process like TAC KSA3 available in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

Can you please read this blog?

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Companion Doesn't Know! Companion Doesn't Know! Let's Tell Companion!
entry.content:
Hi All,
I am trying to add our custom properties for SAP Companion in a Custom Fiori application.
However, it seems like "Help4" is only fully loaded after our Fiori application (even after onAfterRendering)

In the debugger, I can see "Help4" but not yet "Help4.API" and "Help4.init"
these only appear when everything is loaded.

So where should I include my code if I want to use "Help4.API.setCondition"
We want to get user data and then update the Companion accordingly

Hello,

I'm using one bdc recording for transaction MM02 in my program and I need to replace that bdc by suitable bapi to optimise program as it is taking time . Can you please suggest suitable bapi to replace bdc of MM02?

entry.title: Re: Generate PDF Checklist instance report
entry.content:
Hello @Karthic ,
did you try to use the action "build report"? 
We are doing the same and generate a PDF report when the checklist is closed. We downloaded the SAP sample Jasperreport, adjusted it. And the Business Rule that is generated the PDF uses the action "build report". 
Give it a try. 🙂
Best regards, Deborah

entry.title: Post Material BOM | API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_V2 - odata v2
entry.content:
Hello experts,

has anyone in this community ever implemented This API? I kindly ask for your assistance.

API: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV_0002/overview

I want to create a material BOM without items but i couldn't do it, I have some error with my json body, fields are missing. I have looked at the documentation, specifically at the suggested JSON in the API Reference but I wasn't able to understand what is missing.

URL Request: (...)/sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV;v=0002/MaterialBOM

HTTP Method: Post

Request body - JSON:

{
    "BillOfMaterialVariantUsage": "1",
    "IsMultipleBOMAlt": false,
    "BillOfMaterialAuthsnGrp": "",
    "IsConfiguredMaterial": true,
    "BOMTechnicalType": "M",
    "BOMGroup": "",
    "BillOfMaterialStatus": "1",
    "IsMarkedForDeletion": false,
    "IsALE": false,
    "BOMHeaderBaseUnit": "PC",
    "BOMHeaderQuantityInBaseUnit": "2",
    "DocumentIsCreatedByCAD": false,
    "ProductDescription": "Super Bike",
    "PlantName": ""
}

Status: 400 Bad Request

Error details:

{
    "errordetails": [
        {
            "ContentID": "",
            "code": "29/853",
            "message": "Data is incomplete",
            "propertyref": "",
            "severity": "error",
            "transition": true,
            "target": ""
        }
    ]
}

 

Thank you,

Best Regards,

João Vieira

entry.title: How to Convert Attachments on MDF Objects
entry.content:
Hi HCM Community,

I'm trying to convert a pdf attachment in the cust_attachment field on Payment Information and after doing the initial setup on the Zip file (create attachments folder and reference the pdf in the load file), the attachment does not populate in the UI after Importing the Zip (No errors are shown in Scheduled Job Manager). I wanted to ask this group if I missed a step in either the Import Sequence or Properties which will resolve this issue.

I've followed the steps outlined in this KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2257047 but am hoping to get further insight from members in this group.

 

Thanks in advance,

Jack

Regards,

Christian

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Achieves International Business Communication Standards (IBCS) Re-Certification
entry.content:
What is IBCS? 

The International Business Communication Standards (IBCS) gives conceptual design rules for communicating business information in the shortest way to help comprehension, reasoning, and presentation. 

IBCS is based on a concept called SUCCESS which defines seven key principles when it comes to effective business communication: 

  • Say — conveys a message 
  • Unify — applies semantic notation 
  • Condense — increases information density 
  • Check — ensures visual integrity 
  • Express — chooses proper visualization 
  • Simplify — avoids clutter 
  • Structure — organizes content 

Why is IBCS Important for SAP Analytics Cloud? 

With most products there is always a heavy focus on meeting the highest standard of quality, security, and performance. It is one of the reasons why the SAP Analytics Cloud Team invested in the unification of Stories, Analytic Applications, and Classic Digital Boardroom into a single asset called the Optimized Experience. 

However, for the SAP Analytics Cloud Team, there is also a focus on providing a single Planning and Analytics solution that focuses on effective and engaging communication. With IBCS certification, SAP Analytics Cloud customers benefit from having a set of tools that allow for:  

  1. Simplified Communication: IBCS helps to avoid clutter, confusion, and ambiguity in data visualization and reporting. It is because IBCS uses a common language and notation that is easy to understand and interpret across different audiences and contexts.
  2. Structured Content: IBCS helps to organize data and information in a logical and coherent way. IBCS uses a consistent layout, structure, and hierarchy that makes it easier to compare different scenarios and outcomes. 
  3. Enhanced Decision-Making: IBCS helps to support informed and effective decisions based on data and insights. IBCS highlights the most relevant and actionable information and provides clear recommendations and calls to action. 

What are the Improvements from the Previous Certification?  

With the 2024 Q2 QRC release of SAP Analytics Cloud, there are a few improvements that customers now have access to. These improvements allowed SAP Analytics Cloud to receive the seal “IBCS® Certified Charts and Tables” for another 2 years (until February 2026). These improvements include: 

  • IBCS User Generated Themes 
  • Rank and Sort on Absolute and Relative Variance 
  • Support Pattern in Area Charts and Stacked Charts (includes Improved Auto Contrast for Data Labels)  
  • Color by Accounts / Measure and Pattern by Version 
  • Variance Displayed as Waterfall (for Charts) 
  • Rank with Others and Show Totals in Charts 
  • Enable Sort for Version Dimension in a Table   

Let’s dive a bit deeper into each out of these improvements. You can also look at this video created by IBCS®️ Certified Trainer Esin Özkan, which dives into the details on how you can use SAP Analytics Cloud to implement IBCS rules. 

IBCS User Generate Themes 

With Themes in the Optimized Experience, we provide a balance between configuration options available via the Theme Preferences and flexibility with CSS. For the recent certification, we introduce several configuration options within our Theme Preferences such as:  

  • Display of Number Scale (k vs Thousands) 
  • Display of Currency (ISO3 vs Symbol) 
  • Default Number of Decimals for Absolute vs % Measures 
  • Position of Legend for Charts (In-Line, Beside Chart, and so on) 
  • Configuration of Default Threshold Colours 
  • Configuration of Default Variance Colours 

Rank and Sort on Absolute and Relative Variance 

Designers and Viewers now have an option to Rank or Sort by Variance (High to Low or Low to High). It is supported for all display types: Waterfall, Bar, Data Label, and Integrated.  

Support Pattern in Area Charts and Stacked Charts (includes Improved Auto Contrast for Data Labels)  

Designers now have more flexibility with a Dimension and Version on Color in a Stacked Bar / Column and Area Chart:  

  • Pattern will be based on the version members. The pattern remains automatically determined based on the version as per IBCS standards. There is an option to manually override this.  
  • Color will be based on the colour palette and is distributed among the respective dimension members  

With this enhancement, we have also improved the auto contrast for data labels to improve visibility. 

Color by Accounts / Measure and Pattern by Version 

Designers now have more flexibility when version is bound to colour. They now have an option to use the measures/account to set the colour and pattern. 

  • Color by Accounts ON allows the colour to be based on the Account and pattern to be based on Version 
  • Color by Accounts OFF allows the pattern and colour to be based on Version 

It is supported for Bar / Column, Combined Bar / Column & Line, Stacked Column & Line, Line, Histogram, and Area. 

Variance Displayed as Waterfall (for Charts) 

Designers now have an option to display the variance as a Waterfall as a show variance as option  

  • For Variance on Version we respect the pattern for the Bar (Compare) vs Axis (To) 
  • We respect he Scale with the Base Chart which can be overridden 
  • We respect automatically inverting Variance Color based on the Account Type 

It is limited to Bar/Column and Horizontal Waterfall Charts 

Rank with Others and Show Totals in Charts 

Designers and Viewers can now define a rank with a group remaining option.  It will be supported for: 

  • Charts with Flat Dimension(s) 
  • Charts with Measures with Base Aggregation 
  • Define a Rank with Others on Multiple Axes 
  • Others can be placed last (Top N) or first (Bottom N) and can be renamed. For the placement of the Others, it is set automatically with an option to override the position.  

Designers also have an option to show the Total for Dimensions: 

  • The position of totals can be arranged to first or last 
  • Totals can be enabled on multiple dimensions 
  • Supported chart type: Bar Column, Stacked Bar, Marimekko, Heatmap, and Tree Map 

Enable Sort for Version Dimension in a Table   

Designers and Viewers now have an option to sort on the Version Dimension. It is supported for A – Z, Z – A and Custom Order. Default Order remains based on IBCS standards. 

IBCS in SAP Analytics Cloud 

With SAP Analytics Cloud initially certified in December 2017, we are proud to receive the seal “IBCS® Certified Charts and Tables” for another 2 years (until February 2026). There are a few more improvements that we made in the past certifications that are not covered in this Blog Post. These include: 

  • Dynamic Title Generation in Charts 
  • Automatic Chart Orientation with Time and Structure Dimensions 
  • Automatic Version Pattern and Color (includes with Variance)  
  • Chart Scaling and Bar Width 
  • Highlight Differences in Charts 
  • More… 

Our commitment to IBCS remains, and we are honoured to be a close collaborator with IBCS to better understand the additional improvements we need to make before the next certification.  

In case you haven’t done so already, please look at this video created by IBCS®️ Certified Trainer Esin Özkan, which dives into the details on how you can use SAP Analytics Cloud to implement IBCS rules.

entry.title: Adding SubItems in OutboundDeliveryRequest Using PDI ABSL or API
entry.content:
Dears,

I have this cycle where i create a sales order ---> then confirm a customer demand from that sales order ---> then post goods issue of a delivery proposal to create an outbound delivery. There is this requirement that i want to add subitems of main lineitems in outbounddeliveryrequest to add different identified stocks and source logistics area using ABSL code or even API. Is there anyway i could achieve this?

Kindly find attached screen-shots.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: RAP: Default Value (managed with draft)
entry.content:
you can use augment

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/implement-consumption-specific-behavior-in-...

 

or use action to create new instance

entry.title: Earmarked funds not updating in Funds Management
entry.content:
Dear Gurus

 

I am trying to activate the FM module in HANA by copying my customizing from an ECC client which works perfectly.

I activated the new Manage Budget Structure (table FMB_FMADDRESS) and have no problem uploading addresses and posting budget with release strategy. However, when I post a Fund Reservation, the document does NOT trigger the  FMDERIVE, does NOT check the Posting Address (is missing the Funded Program) and does NOT update table FMIOI. Document posts with no error message.

When I execute FMN5N, I get I message  saying the Commitment Item in the document is NOT financial cat 30, but it is fin.cat 30 /3

I would appreciate any feedback.

Atharva

entry.title: How to give CBC authorization?
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to give myself or anyone else (does not matter at the moment actually) authorization in order to access Central Business Configuration.

I have checked several notes, mostly this one:

https://help.sap.com/docs/CENTRAL_BUSINESS_CONFIGURATION/3c391b7b79604a608e02d4914f6b1fbf/c0887022cddc4fa298299d84ddda703f.html

I have assigned every group I could find.

According to SAP notes I should have run this job:

Finally, I successfully did after I gave my user to a Login Name.

What I understood from the note that I should be able to access to CBC via this link:

However, I receive this screen:

I really have no idea what I am missing?

Could anyone please assist me?

Best Regards and Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Intercompany Billing not getting generated.
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,
I am working on Intercompany Billing and for some reason, the invoice is not getting generated occasionally. This issue is not every time but its occurring sporadically. 
I have tried to debug but couldnt find anything. 
Can someone help me understand where can I be going wrong and where can I check to find whats happening?

Since this issue is a sporadic error I think there is no issue in the config part, but I am really confused to why this may happen.
Please help me understand where I can look for the possible error

Thank you

entry.title: Re: MRP run on materials shared between plant and MRP area
entry.content: a production version (PV) with empty receiving storage location (RecSLOC) ist valid for all MRP Areas in the plant. A PV with a RecSLOC is valid only for the MRP Area which contains this SLoc.

entry.title: Re: No processor in submitted documents on Verify General...

entry.title: READ DATASET ERROR
entry.content:
Hello Gurus, I'm trying to debug why its not returning any values for the output.

 

So the process is this

Line 1: File path will be moved to LT_MSGFILE

Line 5: Program will open file path

Line 7: Go to another subroutine

  MOVE P_HYSFLS TO LT_MSGFILE.
  
  CLOSE DATASET P_HYSFLS.

  OPEN DATASET LT_MSGFILE FOR INPUT IN TEXT MODE ENCODING DEFAULT.
  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    PERFORM F_PROCESS-MSGS.
  ENDIF.

 

Go to subroutine F_READ_MSG_FILE which contains READ DATASET

FORM F_PROCESS-MSGS.

  PERFORM F_READ_MSG_FILE.

  IF LV_MSG_EOF = LV_VALUE_Y.
    EXIT.
  ENDIF.

  DO.

    IF LV_MSG_REC+30(2) = LV_VALUE_70 AND
       LV_MSG_REC+51(6) = LV_XDATE.
      EXIT.
    ENDIF.

    PERFORM F_READ_MSG_FILE.

    IF LV_MSG_EOF = LV_VALUE_Y.
      EXIT.
    ENDIF.

  ENDDO.

  IF LV_MSG_EOF = LV_VALUE_Y.
    EXIT.
  ENDIF.

  PERFORM F_READ_MSG_FILE.

  IF LV_MSG_EOF = LV_VALUE_Y.
    EXIT.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

 

FORM F_READ_MSG_FILE.

  READ DATASET LT_MSGFILE INTO LV_MSG_REC.

  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
    LV_MSG_EOF = LV_VALUE_Y.
  ENDIF.

  IF LV_MSG_EOF = LV_VALUE_Y.
    CLOSE DATASET LT_MSGFILE.
  ENDIF.

ENDFORM.

 

Program will do this 3 times

 

The first READ DATASET, file path is read successfully. But for the 2nd one, its returning an error(SY-SUBRC = 4), I don't know why.

entry.title: Re: Employee Master Data Replication in S/4 HANA from Workday
entry.content:
Hi adheeshkurekar,  

could you please provide more details, how did you Define / create the custom Odata Api? 

Thanks for help,

entry.title: Delete Vendor order confirmation
entry.content:
Hello,

we setup ORDER idocs with a vendor and we got back an ORDRSP for it.
The ORDRSP creats an line in the confirmations tab in the purchase order so everything is fine.

Is it possible to delete these line with a second ORDRSP IDOC? So if the vendor wants to withdraw the first ORDRSP and don't can sent a new date.

I'm also facing same issue -> in deployed app I cannot get any data from SAP BTP oData destinations. I'm getting 403 errors (Forbidden) with error: 'CSRF token validation failed'.

Does anyone solve this already?

In 'Preview' mode app is working properly. Problem is with deployed app.

entry.title: Re: Signavio - While uploading Attribute file data is get...
entry.content:
Good day Pradeep,

In response to your inquiry, we recommend going through the Signavio trainings for Process Intelligence or the Fundamentals of Process Mining. 

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence

Analyzing Business Processes with SAP Signavio Solutions

It seems that you do not use our PDM (process data management) but the simple file upload. In the simple file upload only final event logs can be uploaded. The structure looks similar to this for the case attributes and the events listed below:

PI Training Attr v3 EN

Activity Log

Kind regards,

Kantrice D.

entry.title: Re: Sending APIM Alerts made easy using SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello ;

I encountered this error : 

Any idea please

entry.title: Issue with posting asset transactions during migration process
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I don't know, if this topic is answered elswhere. At least, I couldn't find a similar or matching one.

This issue occured lately in a project with a Public Cloud customer. We would like to post transactions to one of the assets, which we transferred earlier to the Q system, via legacy data transfer. There we get the following error message, telling us to change the company code status. In the app 'Make company code settings - asset accounting specific', I see the 'Change Status' button, but changing the status doesn't help the situation.

 

The following is an example of the transaction, we want to replicate in the public cloud surrounding.

Could anyone in the community tell, how it is possible for me/us to solve the issue, and to be able to post transactions to the legacy assets? And which application should I use, if the application I used before is not the right one to solve it?

Thanks in advance, and kind regards,

Jan-Niklas Studt

entry.title: OLD Sales document data is not consider in credit limit process.
entry.content:
How to execute credit checks on old sales orders.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: OLD Sales document data is not consider in credit lim...
entry.content: Schedule job template "Check Credit on SD Documents". You can use the App "Schedule Credit Management Jobs". For more details refer to the help portal documents.

entry.title: Re: How to run UnbindCfServiceInstance command in Automat...
entry.content:
Hello,

It is great that you have come up with a solution. Here are some adjustments you might find helpful.

The input ‘region’ of the command you are using accepts both the technical name or ID of a Cloud Foundry region. However, you need to specify the full technical name. In your case, you should use cf-us10-001 instead of just us10, as the latter is not the full technical name. You can easily see the region for your subscription overview in the SAP BTP Cockpit.
Additionally, you can also navigate to the inputs page in Automation Pilot and check the provided input ‘CfRegionData’ for the technical name of the specific region.

Kind Regards,
Irina Stoeva

entry.title: Re: Event-Based Revenue Recognition - DropShipment
entry.content: Hi Christine, your question has been forwarded to the experts. We hope to provide an answer soon.

entry.title: Re: Copying goals from another goal plan
entry.content:
Hi Lilach,

This option is related to a form template configuration. And it will be removed for newly created forms if you disable following configuration in form template.

Regards,
Luka

entry.title: SAP ECC how to delete all the components in mass for a list of routing ?
entry.content:
Hello,

still working in SAP ECC EHP6, I have a list of routings ( SAP PM transaction IA05 ) with components. I want to delete all the components of these routings ? Is there any way to do this ? 

Thanks 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: BW/4HANA Cockpit slowness
entry.content:
Hi @nachtaktiv 

In addition to follow the steps of SAP note 2918492, we update our BW4 to the latest SP and execute task list SAP_BW4_AFTER_UPDATE, so far the BW/4HANA Cockpit has worked well.

BR Oscar

entry.title: Re: Download software before the end of maintenance
entry.content:
Hi Sanz,

You may have to contact SAP to renew the support contract along with SAP Software Download, because during the upgrade time, you may require SAP support to download some of the patches and SAP bug note fixes.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Encountering Primary Key Requirement in a CAP Project (@sap/cds v6.8 vs. v8)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I recently faced a challenge in my CAP project using Node.js. I defined some entities, and one of them lacked a primary key. When I ran mbt build, I encountered this error:

"This application uses @sap/cds version 6.8, which is not compatible with the installed @sap/cds-dk version 8. You can either:

  • Update @sap/cds to the latest version (recommended)
  • Downgrade @sap/cds-dk to version 7."

Following the recommendation, I upgraded @Sap/cds to the latest stable version (8.0.3). However, after running mbt build again, I received a new error:

[ERROR] Expected entity to have a primary key (in entity: xxxx)

This behavior surprised me because I couldn't find any documentation explicitly mentioning mandatory primary keys for CAP projects, especially since it worked with previous @Sap/cds versions. While I understand the importance of primary keys as good practice, I wanted to clarify if this requirement is officially documented and where to find updates on @Sap/cds version changes.

If you've encountered a similar situation or have insights on primary key requirements in CAP projects, please share your thoughts in the comments below!

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Purchase Order Output
entry.content:
Could you please help me to create purchase order output technical spec in public cloud edition ? The fields in below , must be match .

[Name of a Supplier]
[Address]
[Vendor Code]
[PO Box]
[City]
[Country]
[Contact]
[Telephone]
[Fax No]
[TRN]

In below parameters are right or wrong ?

 

PO No PurchaseOrderNode[PurchaseOrder]
P.O Date PurchaseOrderNode[PurchaseOrderDate]
TRN XXXX
Incoterms PurchaseOrderNode[IncotermsVersionName]
Purchaser Name PurchaseOrderNode[PurchasingGroup]
Terms of Payment PurchaseOrderNode[PaymentTermsName]

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing BTP - SD integration
entry.content: Second part is answered. The source system is not important since the products and business entities are feteched via special destination maintained on BTP side.

I'm based in the UK so we might have a time difference to consider but 23-26 July is fairly flexible for me if that helps. Thanks, Emily

What is the procedure to update an SAP Data Intelligence cluster?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to upscale an SAP Data Intelligence Cloud instance?
entry.content: Follow the instructions detailed in the documentation: Update an SAP Data Intelligence Cloud Instance in SAP BTP

entry.title: Re: Worker Certification Check using Production Process within SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello @VenkattSrinivas ,

'Check Certification' API/Service does work just fine for Process Industries as well.

However, you are definitely correct, and there are some gaps in Order POD and Automatic Triggers that prevent enabling it fully ootb.

A workaround I found that might work for some cases, but with some remarks and limitations is:

  • Create a PPD which does 'Certificate Check' + 'StartOperationActivity' in sequence.
  • Disable 'Start and Complete Operation/Phase Button Visible' from Operation/Phase List plugin in POD Designer and add Action Buttons calling PPDs to Start (the one from previous step including Certificate Check) and Complete.

Now, if you try to Start Phases using the Action Button in Order POD, you get the Certificate Check triggered:

Unfortunatelly, this is not a 100% bullet proof approach, as users can still start phases by posting 'Quantity Confirmation', for example.

Anyway, for educational purposes, I suggest you take a look into this possibility and evaluate.

Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: Completed a training but shows up overdue and incomplete
entry.content: Hi Kevin, is this a free-floating course or is it a part of a curriculum? Is retraining configured?

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales Cloud quotation approval flow
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-cloud-for-customer/solution-guide-for-sap-sales-cloud/sales-quote-approval-process?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Does SAP have job profiles that match with the milita...
entry.content: Hello! We do not already have these codes in the system, and you would need to determine how you want those codes to work with the system in order to determine where to import them to. You can create a Job Profile Template with any number of various fields, and import the data into one of those fields. I suggest that you speak with your implementation partner about the best approach for you.

entry.title: Re: Guide to Korn Ferry and SuccessFactors Integration
entry.content: Hello! You're in luck: we are working on a certified integration of Korn Ferry content into SuccesFactors, and it should soon be possible for you to make use of a productized import mechanism called Package Manager. I would suggest that you have your Korn Ferry account person keep in touch with their colleagues who are managing this process, so that they can let you know when it's ready.

entry.title: Re: Relocation of objects w/o package change and differen...
entry.content: This community is so dead (no offense, I blame SAP with their latest changes with tags and topics and stuff)

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect SAP Content Server to S/4 Hana 2023
entry.content: Found the solution in SAP Note: 2856326

entry.title: Re: How to Convert Attachments on MDF Objects
entry.content: Found the issue when loading the Zip file and am no longer facing this problem

entry.title: Re: Warehouse reports in S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @guchao1008 ,

as you already mentioned, there are several information available in the app "Warehouse Monitor" such as indicators for a putaway block, stock removal block or physical inventory block. In addition, there are capacity figures such as an "Empty" flag, or the already consumed weight, volume or dimensionless capacity.

In addition, I'd encourage you to have a look at the app Manage KPIs and Reports to build your own reports based on released CDS views such as the Storage Bin - Cube CDS View.

If these can't meet your requirement, then please elaborate more on the details of the business requirements that you want to cover.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: Data flow from one appraisal template to another temp...
entry.content:
Hi @ramyateja 

This is not a standard feature performance solution supports today, but following options are relevant to some degree
1. Enable the feature to show the last competency or skill ratings from last review form in current form 
2. check the data in another form through the performance history quick action in current performance form.
3. Depending on how data will be used, you can consider to build extension to pull data from another form and then put the extracted data into current form with public performance form APIs

Regards,
Luka

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud - "Attachments" API - post link to Journal Entry

Hello there, 

Thanks  a lot for this awesome Guide! Unfortunately i do get the Error "You have no authorization for attachments" any idea how to resolve this? Kind regards, Philipp

I have a Bachelor's degree in commerce.I'm first generation college graduate in my family.

chandni

entry.title: Re: Batch Call Processing in SAP NetWeaver Gateway
entry.content:
Still a great block, not outdated 🙂 Great help. It all worked as described.

Just a remark, I wonder if the ABAP statement in your screenshot (Figure 16) really works as expected: copy_data_to_ref( exporting is_data = ls_changeset_request
                            changing cr_data = ls_changeset_response-entity_data ). 

I think, it should be "ls_data" instead to return the correct values. But maybe I am wrong, and it was written by some specific intention, but didn't work for me. So I corrected.

BR Hubertus

entry.title: Embedded analytics query default variant reset
entry.content:
Hi Team,

we are using the total account receivable application and one user set a variant which runs wide and set it as "Run default variant on open" . after this whenever user open the app, it starts running with the variant and gives data dump due to the data volume. The user is not able to reset the variant since it always runs first before giving the option to change. is there any way to change the variant or delete it .

 

Thanks,

Jino

Thomas Jung

entry.title: BW/4HANA BW Query usage statistics
entry.content:
Hi guys!

My guess is that I am completely lost and I do not know how to use the BW/4HANA Cockpit.

What I'm looking for is the BW Query usage statistics (than I used to find in the old BEx Query). Now, I know that the old content was moved to BW/4HANA Cockpit but I am not able to find the BW Query usage.

I find out that I can use 2CRVCOLAPSTATAQ to get what I need, but me guess is that this "query" has to be also in the cockpit.  So far I'm looking into the app Data Volumen Statistics and Data Selection Statistics. But I looking something like the result of query 2CRVCOLAPSTATAQ.  Something like this exists in the BW4 Cockpit?

Thanks in advance, Oscar A.

entry.title: How to give filename dynamically in file sender channel
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to call the REST API to get the file name in response payload and use that particular filename in file sender channel to poll the file from SFTP server and place it in S4.

Kindly suggest how we can give the file name dynamically.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Niyati

entry.title: UI5 Input Value Dissappearing After Selecting from Value Help Dialog Using OData V4 and RAP
entry.content:
I'm developing a UI5 application that includes input fields with various value help dialogs. The application is a freestyle app utilizing an OData V4 service, which I built using CDS Views and the RESTful Application Programming (RAP) model. Consequently, I assumed that using sap.fe.macros.Field would be appropriate for this scenario.

The OData service reads from a table that contains one entry with empty fields, allowing me to use this service for value help binding.

The Issue:
When I select a value from the value help dialog, it briefly appears in the input field for about one second before disappearing. It seems like the fields are reloading and fetching empty values from the backend.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? How can I resolve it? Should I consider using different UI elements?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Maximize Value with Value Analytics for SAP Ariba
entry.content:
Anyone looking out for some analytics on SAP Ariba solutions?

Starting with SAP Analytics Cloud Content Release Q2 2024 you will find a new package in your SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere semantic onboarding section by the name of Value Analytics for SAP Ariba Procurement (SAP Datasphere).

The content included serves as a broad foundation to analyze all steps across your sourcing and procurement processes done in the SAP Ariba solution suite. It comes with quite a number of data models in SAP Datasphere that will allow you to get most of your questions answered like

  • how is your company's spend behavior?
  • how can the sourcing / procurement processes be optimized?
  • how can you leverage savings potentials?

You can take this as a starter to get going. And as always you are free to enhance these data models bringing your own data and models for extension cases to get the big picture and reflect data of your company's end-2-end solution landscape.

 

SAP Analytics Cloud Stories

The package comes with three SAP Analytics Cloud stories to give you an idea of what can be built on top of the delivered SAP Datasphere data models:

1. SAP Ariba Source to Pay - Procurement Strategic Spend Overview

This story provides you with insights into the value your sourcing and procurement program delivers. It does so via providing both direct cost savings as well as corresponding KPIs. In addition, the story provides detailed data that allows you to identify root causes for process gaps, allowing you to drive continuous improvement.

The story consists of 5 pages, covering 

  • Value Analytics customer gain visibility into the ROI they've achieved using Ariba
  • Cost Savings shows spend that has been strategically sourced, price reduction from sourcing events and guided buying RFQs, savings rates as a % of sourced spend and trued-up savings.
  • Spend Compliance tracks year-over-year improvement to compliant spend put through proper buy channels
  • Working Capital measure captured and lost discounts across supply base
  • Process Improvement measure cycle times for all critical source to pay subprocesses like supplier onboarding, sourcing project, contract execution, REQ to PO and invoice processing

Strategic Spend Overview - Process Improvement

2. SAP Ariba Source to Pay - Procurement Operational Spend Overview

This story uncovers the untapped potential of your procurement practice, gaining valuable insights through a holistic operational view of your source to pay process. It will help you to maximize your end-to-end procurement efficiency, mitigate supplier risks and optimize category spend.

The story consists of 5 pages, covering 

  • Supplier Management: Onboarding of suppliers, risk exposure, geographical distribution, registration and qualification status
  • Sourcing: Awarded amounts per event/commodity and risk attached, event leading and pending savings, event participation over time and events per event owner
  • Contracts: Contract amounts per project owner/commodity and attached supplier risks, cycle times per project, distribution of contract types and contract expiration term types, overview of expiring contracts
  • Buying: spend details per cost center/commodity over time, contract vs. non-contract spend, catalog vs. non-catalog spend, approval cycle times , rejections rates and approval time per approver
  • Invoicing: Inovoice amounts per cost center/commodity/over time and cash flow related, amounts per due date

Operational Spend Overview - Supplier Management

Operational Spend Overview - Contracts


3. SAP Ariba Source to Pay - Supplier 360

This story allows you to gain a complete 360 view over your suppliers. ​
Discover a panoramic perspective of your suppliers related procurement spend, from a risk, a geography or even an individual supplier angle. This will help you to identify top-performing suppliers, mitigate supplier risks and increase your suppliers’ overall process compliance.

Supplier 360 Story

 

SAP Datasphere Models

Once imported you can find all related objects in the SAP_CONTENT space. 

The stories in SAP Analytics Cloud and their data models in SAP Datasphere combine data from various Ariba Solutions like:

Supplier Management

  • SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance
  • SAP Ariba Supplier Risk

Sourcing and Contracts

  • SAP Ariba Sourcing
  • SAP Ariba Contracts

Procurement

  • SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing
  • SAP Ariba Guided Buying (Tactical Sourcing)

Please check the image below to get a first understanding of what is included. 

Overview SAP Datasphere Models

The objects have roughly been separated to reflect applications in the SAP Ariba suite, using the following naming convention:

SM -> Supplier Management

SC -> Sourcing & Contracts

BI -> Buying & Invoicing 

Here is one example for analyzing your Invoice line items (based on Analytical API data). It will help you to sort your invoices according to self defined aging buckets and to identify invoices with exceptions easily. 

Data modeling has followed the layered approach as for general content development in SAP Datasphere:

In the Inbound Layer (IL) you will find the local table SAP Ariba: Invoice Line Items (LT) (SAP_ARIBA_SRC_INVOICELINEITEMS_AN) and an abstracting view on top SAP Ariba: Invoice Line Items - A (IL) (SAP_PROC_BI_IL_InvoiceLineItems) that adds realm specifica like the reporting currency.

In the Harmonization Layer (HL) on top, you will find the Fact View that combines the Invoice Line Item data with the invoice exceptions plus the Date Grid view that "attaches" the dynamic date buckets to your invoice data to let you check on due dates for your invoices.

In the Reporting Layer (RL) on top, the Analytic Model SAP Ariba: Invoice Line Items - A (RL) (SAP_PROC_BI_RL_InvoiceLineItems) defines additional calculated measures and exposes the data to your SAP Analytics Cloud story.

Invoice Line Items with due date aging information

Aging Invoices Per Supplier

In case you are operating on multiple realms, don't shy away, this has been catered for throughout the data models. So you can report on single or multiple realms.

 

Data Integration

How to get your SAP Ariba data into SAP Datasphere?

The data is sourced from SAP Ariba using the following APIs:

  • Analytical API
  • Operational Reporting API for Procurement
  • Operational Reporting API for Strategic Sourcing
  • Supplier Data API
  • Risk Exposure API
  • Master Data Retrieval API for Procurement

For replicating the data from your SAP Ariba applications the Ariba Extractor app is used. The Ariba Extractor is a BTP application  that you can deploy on your BTP account. It can be modified and extended by customers and partners as they see fit.

Please see the image below to get a better idea of the set up.

Data Integration from SAP Ariba to SAP Datasphere

Once set up, you can schedule load jobs to have the data replicated into tables of an HDI container that is attached to your SAP Datasphere tenant. The SAP Datasphere models are based on top of these tables.

To get started, you can check out this detailed discovery mission that explains the set up and replication process in detail.

 

Content Documentation

Now where can you get more info on the analytics package?

For installing the packages on SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere side and getting started please check out the documentation. This will also give you an overview of all data models included.

You can find more details on the Value Analytics for SAP Ariba Procurement content package in

SAP Analytics Cloud Content Documentation

SAP Datasphere Business Content Documentation

 

Hope you enjoyed reading this blog describing the new Value Analytics for SAP Ariba Procurement package. For feedback and enhancement ideas for the package, please reach out to us at  sap_analytics_cloud_content@sap.com

Also if you have questions and want to share with other users feel free to post a question in the community:

  • For SAP Analytics Cloud, please start here.
  • For SAP Datasphere, please start here

entry.title: Re: SAP Code Jam in Belgium (Gent Region) - RAP
entry.content: I've recorded your request and we will discuss it with our ABAP colleagues in Europe.  Please note that the proposed dates are quite close to the TechEd events this year.  We might have difficulty there with expert availability during that time.

entry.title: I want to create a custom promotion condition using the CustomerType Object which is an Enum Type
entry.content: I want to create a custom promotion condition using the CustomerType Object which is an Enum Type if the CustomerType.REGISTERED is equals to the provided value through B.O. then an existing action should be used. How to make the custom promotion condition ? Also I have created a mapper class to map the value of enum through B.O. but after saving it through exception "Value is not an instance of string" from class DefaultRuleParameterValueMapperStrategy.class how to fix this issue too ?

entry.title: Request to host a CodeJam in Bangalore
entry.content:
Dear CodeJam Experts,

We are interested to host a SAP CodeJam in Henkel GTC Bangalore Office.

  • Location:  Bangalore, India
  • Requested Topic if you have a preference:
    • Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh
    • OR
    • Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python
  • Time frame if you have something in mind: September-2024
  • Contact details: nawal.mittal@henkel.com

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Can we send the production order details to a machine...
entry.content: Hi! If my answer was useful, please consider accepting it as the solution. Br, Manoel
